|  | UTC+10:00 (year round) | | Eastern Time |
|  | UTC+10:00 | [UTC+11:00](/wiki/UTC%2B11:00 "UTC+11:00") | Eastern Time |
|  | [UTC+10:30](/wiki/UTC%2B10:30 "UTC+10:30") | [UTC+11:00](/wiki/UTC%2B11:00 "UTC+11:00") | [Lord Howe Island](/wiki/Lord_Howe_Island "Lord Howe Island") |

**UTC+10:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +10:00. This time is used in:

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Vladivostok](/wiki/Vladivostok "Vladivostok"), [Khabarovsk](/wiki/Khabarovsk "Khabarovsk"), [Saipan](/wiki/Saipan "Saipan"), [Dededo](/wiki/Dededo "Dededo"), [Port Moresby](/wiki/Port_Moresby "Port Moresby"), [Brisbane](/wiki/Brisbane "Brisbane"), [Gold Coast](/wiki/Gold_Coast,_Queensland "Gold Coast, Queensland")

### North Asia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: North Asia")]

* Russia – [Vladivostok Time](/wiki/Vladivostok_Time "Vladivostok Time")[[1]](#cite_note-ttrussia-1)
  + [Far Eastern Federal District](/wiki/Far_Eastern_Federal_District "Far Eastern Federal District")
    - [Jewish Autonomous Oblast](/wiki/Jewish_Autonomous_Oblast "Jewish Autonomous Oblast"), [Khabarovsk Krai](/wiki/Khabarovsk_Krai "Khabarovsk Krai"), [Primorsky Krai](/wiki/Primorsky_Krai "Primorsky Krai"), [Sakha Republic](/wiki/Sakha_Republic "Sakha Republic"), [Oymyakonsky](/wiki/Oymyakonsky "Oymyakonsky"), [Ust-Yansky](/wiki/Ust-Yansky "Ust-Yansky"), [Verkhoyansky](/wiki/Verkhoyansky "Verkhoyansky") and districts of the [Sakha Republic](/wiki/Sakha_Republic "Sakha Republic") (central part; east of 140 degrees longitude and including the Abyysky, Allaikhovsky, Momsky, Nizhnekolymsky, and Srednekolymsky districts)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Oceania")]

#### Pacific Ocean

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Pacific Ocean")]

#### Micronesia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Micronesia")]

* Federated States of Micronesia[[3]](#cite_note-wtzoce-3)
  + [Chuuk](/wiki/Chuuk_State "Chuuk State")
  + [Yap](/wiki/Yap "Yap")
* United States - [Chamorro Time Zone](/wiki/Chamorro_Time_Zone "Chamorro Time Zone")
  + [Guam](/wiki/Guam "Guam")
  + [Northern Mariana Islands](/wiki/Northern_Mariana_Islands "Northern Mariana Islands")

#### Melanesia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Melanesia")]

* [Papua New Guinea](/wiki/Papua_New_Guinea "Papua New Guinea")
  + All of the country except [Autonomous Region of Bougainville](/wiki/Autonomous_Region_of_Bougainville "Autonomous Region of Bougainville")[[4]](#cite_note-tdbougainville-4)
    - [Highlands Region](/wiki/Highlands_Region "Highlands Region")
      * [Chimbu](/wiki/Chimbu_Province "Chimbu Province")
      * [Eastern Highlands](/wiki/Eastern_Highlands_Province "Eastern Highlands Province")
      * [Enga](/wiki/Enga_Province "Enga Province")
      * [Hela](/wiki/Hela_Province "Hela Province")
      * [Jiwaka](/wiki/Jiwaka_Province "Jiwaka Province")
      * [Southern Highlands](/wiki/Southern_Highlands_Province "Southern Highlands Province")
      * [Western Highlands](/wiki/Western_Highlands_Province "Western Highlands Province")
    - [Islands Region](/wiki/Islands_Region "Islands Region")
      * [East New Britain](/wiki/East_New_Britain_Province "East New Britain Province")
      * [Manus](/wiki/Manus_Province "Manus Province")
      * [New Ireland](/wiki/New_Ireland_Province "New Ireland Province")
      * [West New Britain](/wiki/West_New_Britain_Province "West New Britain Province")
    - [Momase Region](/wiki/Momase_Region "Momase Region")
      * [East Sepik](/wiki/East_Sepik_Province "East Sepik Province")
      * [Madang](/wiki/Madang_Province "Madang Province")
      * [Morobe](/wiki/Morobe_Province "Morobe Province")
      * [Sandaun (West Sepik)](/wiki/Sandaun_Province "Sandaun Province")
    - [Southern Region](/wiki/Southern_Region,_Papua_New_Guinea "Southern Region, Papua New Guinea")
      * [Central](/wiki/Central_Province_(Papua_New_Guinea) "Central Province (Papua New Guinea)")
      * [Gulf](/wiki/Gulf_Province "Gulf Province")
      * [Milne Bay](/wiki/Milne_Bay_Province "Milne Bay Province")
      * [Oro (Northern)](/wiki/Oro_Province "Oro Province")
      * [Western](/wiki/Western_Province_(Papua_New_Guinea) "Western Province (Papua New Guinea)")

#### Australasia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Australasia")]

* Australia – [Eastern Standard Time](/wiki/Australian_Eastern_Standard_Time "Australian Eastern Standard Time") (AEST)
  + [Queensland](/wiki/Queensland "Queensland")

### Antarctica

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Antarctica")]

#### Southern Ocean

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Southern Ocean")]

* Some bases in [Antarctica](/wiki/Antarctica "Antarctica"). See also [Time in Antarctica](/wiki/Time_in_Antarctica "Time in Antarctica").
* Australia
  + [Australian Antarctic Territory](/wiki/Australian_Antarctic_Territory "Australian Antarctic Territory")
    - [Macquarie Island](/wiki/Macquarie_Island "Macquarie Island")
* France
  + [French Southern and Antarctic Lands](/wiki/French_Southern_and_Antarctic_Lands "French Southern and Antarctic Lands")
    - [Adélie Land](/wiki/Ad%C3%A9lie_Land "Adélie Land")
      * [Dumont d'Urville Station](/wiki/Dumont_d%27Urville_Station "Dumont d'Urville Station")

## As standard time (Southern Hemisphere winter)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: As standard time (Southern Hemisphere winter)")]

Principal cities: [Canberra](/wiki/Canberra "Canberra"), [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney"), [Melbourne](/wiki/Melbourne "Melbourne"), [Hobart](/wiki/Hobart "Hobart")

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Oceania")]

* Australia – [Eastern Standard Time](/wiki/Australian_Eastern_Standard_Time "Australian Eastern Standard Time") (AEST)
  + [Australian Capital Territory](/wiki/Australian_Capital_Territory "Australian Capital Territory")
  + [Jervis Bay Territory](/wiki/Jervis_Bay_Territory "Jervis Bay Territory")
  + [New South Wales](/wiki/New_South_Wales "New South Wales") (except [Broken Hill](/wiki/Broken_Hill "Broken Hill") and its surrounds, as well as [Lord Howe Island](/wiki/Lord_Howe_Island "Lord Howe Island"))
  + [Tasmania](/wiki/Tasmania "Tasmania")
  + [Victoria](/wiki/Victoria_(Australia) "Victoria (Australia)")

## Discrepancies between official UTC+10:00 and geographical UTC+10:00

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Discrepancies between official UTC+10:00 and geographical UTC+10:00")]

### Areas in UTC+10:00 longitudes using other time zones

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Areas in UTC+10:00 longitudes using other time zones")]

Using [UTC+09:00](/wiki/UTC%2B09:00 "UTC+09:00"):

* Japan
  + The eastern parts of [Hokkaido](/wiki/Hokkaido "Hokkaido"), including [Obihiro](/wiki/Obihiro "Obihiro"), [Kushiro](/wiki/Kushiro "Kushiro"), and [Nemuro](/wiki/Nemuro,_Hokkaido "Nemuro, Hokkaido")
  + [Minami-Tori-shima](/wiki/Minami-Tori-shima "Minami-Tori-shima") in [Ogasawara municipality](/wiki/Ogasawara,_Tokyo "Ogasawara, Tokyo")
* Russia
  + [New Siberian Islands](/wiki/New_Siberian_Islands "New Siberian Islands")
    - [Novaya Sibir](/wiki/Novaya_Sibir "Novaya Sibir")
    - [Faddeyevsky Island](/w/index.php?title=Faddeyevsky_Pennisula&action=edit&redlink=1 "Faddeyevsky Pennisula (page does not exist)")
    - A small part of [Kotelny Island](/wiki/Kotelny_Island "Kotelny Island")
    - The eastern part of [Great Lyakhovsky Island](/wiki/Great_Lyakhovsky_Island "Great Lyakhovsky Island")

Using [UTC+11:00](/wiki/UTC%2B11:00 "UTC+11:00"):

* Russia
  + [Sakhalin Oblast](/wiki/Sakhalin_Oblast "Sakhalin Oblast") (eastern part of [Sakhalin Island](/wiki/Sakhalin "Sakhalin") and Russian territory of [Kuril Islands](/wiki/Kuril_Islands "Kuril Islands"))
  + The most part of [Magadan Oblast](/wiki/Magadan_Oblast "Magadan Oblast")
  + [Sakha Republic](/wiki/Sakha_Republic "Sakha Republic") (eastern part; Oymyakonsky, Ust-Yansky, and Verkhoyansky districts)
* Micronesia
  + The western part of [Pohnpei](/wiki/Pohnpei_State "Pohnpei State")
* Papua New Guinea
  + Autonomous Region of Bougainville, except island in very east
* Solomon Islands
  + [Shortland Islands](/wiki/Shortland_Islands "Shortland Islands")
  + [Choiseul](/wiki/Choiseul_Island "Choiseul Island"), with an exception in very east
  + The western part of [New Georgia Islands](/wiki/New_Georgia_Islands "New Georgia Islands")

### Areas outside UTC+10:00 longitudes using UTC+10:00 time

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Areas outside UTC+10:00 longitudes using UTC+10:00 time")]

#### Areas between 127°30′ E and 142°30′ E ("physical" UTC+09:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B10:00&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Areas between 127°30′ E and 142°30′ E (\"physical\" UTC+09:00)")]

* Russia
  + Central part of Sakha Republic
  + Most of Khabarovsk Krai
  + Jewish Autonomous Oblast
  + Primorsky Krai
* Papua New Guinea
  + The very westernmost parts in the country
* Australia
  + The western parts of Queensland
  + The westernmost parts of New South Wales and Victoria, except [Broken Hill](/wiki/Broken_Hill "Broken Hill") (standard time)
